buildSummary: Frontline build notes—control and protection first so the party can keep its rhythm.

diskSets.name: Your Happiness is Priceless (S)

diskSets.name: Umbrella (A)
diskSets.note: A sturdy tank Arc for early chapters while you chase dream defensive sets.

modules.name: A-tier Tank Modules
modules.note: Mixed defense rolls until a premium tank set appears.

farming.name: Esper EXP materials
farming.tip: Raise DEF units early if your team gets one-shot in anomalies.

farming.tip: Upgrade mitigation skills before damage skills on tanks.
